task_completion.description: Enter the required PIN to access the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PIN pad or login screen is visible with the agent entering '1111'.

task_completion.description: Successfully access the Back Office dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Back Office main dashboard or administrative menu is loaded and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the menu categories management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a 'Categories', 'Menu Management', or similar section where menu groupings are listed.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the 'BEVERAGES' category for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'BEVERAGES' category is visible and the agent clicks on it, opens its edit menu, or selects it for dragging.

task_completion.description: Move the 'BEVERAGES' category to the first position
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'BEVERAGES' category is shown at the very top of the category list, or its specific 'sort order' / 'position' field is explicitly changed to 0.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within the Point of Sale (POS) or Back Office graphical interface. No terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual POS software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the genuine POS/restaurant management application, not a text editor, generic web browser modifying local HTML, or mocked UI.

integrity.description: Verify the database was not modified directly via external tools
integrity.visual_evidence: No database client (like DB Browser for SQLite or command-line sqlite3) is open or used to manually change the sort order to 0.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target category is 'BEVERAGES'. Its initial sort order is 99. The task is successfully completed when the sort order of 'BEVERAGES' is changed to 0 (the first position) using the Back Office GUI.
